summary: Script is excellent (explicit types, error handling, testability via dependency injection), but workflow is incomplete. Critical: fixture files (fixtures/config.json, fixtures/package-*.json) and tests/unit.test.ts referenced in workflow steps don't exist—workflow will fail immediately. Hard-coded Bun path ${HOME}/.bun/bin/bun (lines 13, 18, 22, 26, 30) is fragile; should rely on PATH. Workflow repeats 3 identical check-step patterns (lines 17–28) without refactoring into composite action/script. Missing: actionlint validation step, act-result.txt artifact collection (required by task), error handling for Bun install failure. Script itself is ship-ready but workflow infra is incomplete.
